---
title: "Icones plantarum, or, Figures, with Brief Descriptive Characters and Remarks, of New or Rare Plants, Selected from the Author's Herbarium"
---

## Icones plantarum, or, Figures, with Brief Descriptive Characters and Remarks, of New or Rare Plants, Selected from the Author's Herbarium

**Author:** Sir William Jackson Hooker
**Date:** 1837-54
**Imprint:** London: Longman

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
